addons.name: SyncFolder
addons.author: webe132
addons.description: Syncs chosen folders between all instances through one shared folder.
addons.longDescription: Keeps chosen folders in sync across all of your instances. It uses one shared folder as a hub: every selected folder is mirrored between that hub and each instance, so a file saved while playing one version is available in every other. Tick which folders to sync (shaders, resource packs, schematics, worlds), optionally set a custom shared folder path, and the newest copy of each file always wins. Nested files such as worlds are handled too.
